name: Curative Biotechnology Inc
business: Curative Biotechnology Inc is a development stage biomedical company focusing on in-licensing, sub-licensing, and commercializing pharmaceutical and medical device products, currently concentrating nearly all resources on its Degenerative Eye Disease platform utilizing a reformulated Metformin eye drop for age-related macular degeneration. The company also holds licenses for a rabies immunotherapy (IMT504) and an antibody-drug conjugate for glioblastoma, but has not yet submitted any IND applications or generated revenue.
sellsTo: Patients with age-related macular degeneration (dry AMD, geographic atrophy)

exposures.sentence: We are a development stage biomedical company seeking to develop, in-license, sub-license and commercialize products in both the pharmaceutical and medical device areas.
Our development pipeline historically has focused on three (3) therapeutic areas: infectious diseases, oncology, and degenerative eye disease.
We have entered into an exclusive license agreement to develop and commercialize therapeutics for retinal degenerative diseases with certain licensed assets.
Effective September 30, 2020, we received an option to pay $50,000 for an exclusive royalty-free license to US Patent #8,287,505 relating to an ophthalmic drop dispending tip assembly.

catalysts.event: Complete a Phase 1 Clinical Study or initiate a Phase 2 Clinical Study for treatment of first indicated disease (dry AMD) within Field of Use
catalysts.sentence: On or before March 2 nd 2026 complete a Phase 1 Clinical Study for initiate a Phase 2 Clinical Study for treatment of a first indicated disease within the Field of Use using a Licensed Product.

catalysts.event: Complete a Phase 2 Clinical Study or initiate a Phase 3 Clinical Study for treatment of first indicated disease
catalysts.sentence: On or before February 2 nd 2027 complete a Phase 2 Clinical Study or initiate a Phase 3 Clinical Study for the treatment of a first indicated disease within the Field of Use using a Licensed Product.

catalysts.event: First Commercial Sale of a Licensed Product to treat first indicated disease
catalysts.sentence: On or before. February 2 nd 2030 complete a First Commercial Sale of a Licensed Product to treat a first indicated disease within a Field of Use.

catalysts.event: Initiate clinical studies for treatment of a second indicated disease
catalysts.sentence: On or before February 2 nd 2030 initiate clinical studies for treatment of an at least second indicated disease within the Field of Use using a Licensed Product.

catalysts.event: First Commercial Sale of a Licensed Product to treat at least a second indicated disease
catalysts.sentence: On or before February 2 nd 2031 complete a First commercial Sale of a Licensed Product to treat at least a second indicated disease with the Field of Use.

catalysts.event: Exercise of exclusive option to commercial license for glioblastoma ADC from NCI
catalysts.sentence: This license and all applicable milestone dates has since been extended by amendment through November 30 th , 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly 10% of the world's population is over 60, increasing the prevalence of age-related macular degeneration.
tamClaims.sentence: Nearly 10% of the world s population is over 60, increasing the prevalence of age-related macular degeneration.

tamClaims.claim: Annual anti-VEGF sales for treatment of retinal diseases estimated to exceed $11 billion globally in 2019.
tamClaims.sentence: According to EyeWire News, in 2019, annual anti-VEGF (Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor) sales reported for the treatment of retinal diseases was estimated to exceed $11 billion in 2019 globally.

tamClaims.claim: Economic burden of dog-mediated rabies is estimated at USD 8.6 billion per year globally.
tamClaims.sentence: Globally, the economic burden of dog-mediated rabies is estimated at USD 8.6 billion per year.

tamClaims.claim: More than 29 million people worldwide receive post-bite vaccination for rabies each year.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the WHO, every year, more than 29 million people worldwide receive a post-bite vaccination.

tamClaims.claim: Dry AMD accounts for 80-90% of AMD cases.
tamClaims.sentence: Dry AMD accounts for 80-90% of AMD cases, while wet AMD is 10-20% of cases.
